zh.lifeSummary: 當Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano於大約1170年出生在義大利維圖帕多瓦艾斯特時，他的父親Margrave Azzo V d' Este39歲，母親Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara36歲。他於1203年2月22日與Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1212年11月18日在義大利維圖維洛納享年43歲，埋葬在義大利維圖羅維戈巴迪亞 波萊希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano于大约1170年出生在意大利維圖帕多瓦艾斯特时，他的父亲Margrave Azzo V d' Este39岁，母亲Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara36岁。他于1203年2月22日与Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1212年11月18日在意大利維圖維洛納享年43岁，埋葬在意大利維圖羅維戈巴迪亞 波萊希。

nameMeanings.name: d'Este
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Aloys, Juergen, Kurt.

German: topographic name for someone who lived by the Beste river, a tributary of the Trave (Brandenburg), or a habitational name from any of various villages called Besten (North Rhine-Westphalia), said to be named with a Middle Low German word for poor soil.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Sebastian  .

variants.name: Sebastian
meanings: German, English, French, and Jewish; Spanish (Sebastián): from the personal name Sebastian, Latin Sebastianus, borne by a 3rd-century Christian saint. This was originally an ethnic name meaning ‘man from Sebastia’, a city in Pontus named from Greek sebastos ‘revered’ (the Greek equivalent of Augustus). This surname is also sometimes borne by Jews, presumably as an adoption of the German surname.

nameMeanings.name: Azzo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano was born about 1170, in Este, Padova, Veneto, Italy, his father, Margrave Azzo V d' Este, was 39 and his mother, Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, was 36. He married Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini on 22 February 1203. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 18 November 1212, in Verona, Veneto, Italy, at the age of 43, and was buried in Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano est né environ 1170, à Este, Padova, Veneto, Italie, son père, Margrave Azzo V d' Este, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini le 22 février 1203. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1212, à Verona, Veneto, Italie, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano um 1170 in Este, Padova, Veneto, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Margrave Azzo V d' Este 39 und seine Mutter Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara 36. Er hat am 22. Februar 1203 Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 18. November 1212 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Verona, Veneto, Italien und wurde in Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano è nato il circa 1170 nel Este, Padova, Veneto, Italia, il suo padre, Margrave Azzo V d' Este, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini il 22 febbraio 1203. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 18 novembre 1212, nel Verona, Veneto, Italia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Azzo IV. d'Este di Milanoが約1170年にイタリアベンエトープアドヴァエストで生まれた時，父Margrave Azzo V d' Esteは39歳，母Marchesella Adelardi di Ferraraは36歳であった。1203年2月22日にMaria Elisa d'Aldobrandiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1212年11月18日にイタリアベンエトーバーオナで43歳で死去し，イタリアベンエトーロヴィゴバディア ポレシンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano(이)가 대략 1170년 이탈리아 븐토 파도바 에스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Margrave Azzo V d' Este(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1203년 2월 22일 Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1212년 11월 18일 이탈리아 븐토 베로나에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 븐토 로비고 바디아 포레신에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Este, Padova, Veneto, Itália, seu pai, Margrave Azzo V d' Este, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini em 22 de fevereiro de 1203. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1212, em Verona, Veneto, Itália, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano родился около 1170 г. в местности эст, падова, винето, Италия, его отцу по имени Margrave Azzo V d' Este было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini 22 февраля 1203 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 18 ноября 1212 г. в местности вирона, винето, Италия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности бадя полесаин, ровиго, винето, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Azzo IV. d'Este di Milano nació aproximadamente 1170, en Este, Padova, Veneto, Italia, su papá, Margrave Azzo V d' Este, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Marchesella Adelardi di Ferrara, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Maria Elisa d'Aldobrandini el 22 de febrero de 1203. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1212, en Verona, Veneto, Italia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Badia Polesine, Rovigo, Veneto, Italia.
